title: What is a detective mainly responsible for?

answer_2: A real police officer in London

title: Who is Conan (Detective Conan)?

right_answer: A young detective with exceptional deduction skills

title: Who is Hercule Poirot?

title: What is a crime scene?

title: What is forensic science used for?

title: What is evidence?
